learning_outcomes.description: Explain the relevance of intellectual property concepts in varied biotechnological contexts;
Interrogate patent and scientific databases using tools employed by biotechnology professionals;
Interrogate the underpinning science of core technologies across medical, agricultural, and industrial biotechnology, including their scientific foundations and applications;
Describe the therapeutic drug development pipeline and clinical trials process.

assessments.task_description:
The zoom-invigilated in semester examination will sample your knowledge of topics covered in Module 1.

Use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Translation (MT)

This assessment task is to be completed in-person. The use of generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) or Machine Translation (MT) tools will not be permitted. Any attempted use of AI or MT may constitute student misconduct under the Student Code of Conduct.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.

assessments.due_date:
16/09/2026 2:00 pm

Detailed instructions on how to complete this task are provided on Blackboard.
assessments.task_description:
The ability to learn independently and to communicate effectively are both key traits that are valuable not only in a career, but in most fields. In the 'Innovation Pitch' assessment, students are required to prepare a video recording 5 minutes long, which provides a critical analysis and discussion of a topic pertinent to Biotechnology Innovation. Detailed instructions on how to complete this task are provided on Blackboard.

Use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Translation (MT)

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Translation (MT) are emerging tools that may support students in completing this assessment task. Students may appropriately use AI and/or MT in completing this assessment task. Students must clearly reference any use of AI or MT in each instance.

A failure to reference generative AI or MT use may constitute student misconduct under the Student Code of Conduct.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Submit your Innovation Pitch through the course submission point in Blackboard. Before submitting your assessment item in Blackboard, name your file in the following way: FAMILY NAME_GivenName_StudentID_CourseCode_AssignmentName. For example: Bob Smith (ID: 54329876) would name his ABCD1234 essay 1 in the following way: SMITH_Bob_54329876_ABCD1234_Essay1
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
These three Blackboard quizzes will sample your knowledge and understanding of topics covered in the 'Agricultural Biotechnology', 'Industrial Biotechnology', and 'Medical Biotechnology' Modules. Each quiz is worth 10% of your final grade. It is your responsibility to ensure you have reliable internet access throughout each quiz.

Use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Translation (MT)

This task has been designed to be challenging, authentic and complex. Whilst students may use AI and/or MT technologies, successful completion of assessment in this course will require students to critically engage in specific contexts and tasks for which artificial intelligence will provide only limited support and guidance.

A failure to reference generative AI or MT use may constitute student misconduct under the Student Code of Conduct.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to defer this exam.
assessments.late_submission: Exams submitted after the end of the submission time will incur a late penalty.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to defer this exam.
